quiz.question:
You're attacking the bishop on b4 with a3, but Black plays ...a5, sacrificing. 

What should you do?

answers.text: Decline the sacrifice to keep the king safe.

feedback.text: Yes, this is the practical approach. You're not forced to take, and if you do take, your king will come under fire.

distractors.text: Accept the sacrifice (axb4), there's no danger.

feedback.text: There is some major danger along the a-file.

distractors.text: Accept the sacrifice, but give the material back somehow.

feedback.text: Accepting the sacrifice opens up the a-file and is tough to defend from a practical point of view.
